infrastructure.binary_null: Exact uniform enumeration over 63 reachable states.
infrastructure.weighted_null: 10,000 descriptive draws: uniform state plus random reassignment of the global positive-weight multiset; node strengths are not preserved.

knowledge.target_distribution: Uniform over reachable undirected simple graphs with the observed degree sequence.
knowledge.proposal_mechanism: Choose two edge indices uniformly with unbiased integer sampling; choose one of the two endpoint pairings with probability 1/2.
knowledge.acceptance_rule: Accept only disjoint-edge proposals that create two absent simple-graph edges.
knowledge.invalid_proposals: Retained as self-loops and counted as proposal steps.
knowledge.stationary_distribution_reason: The proposal kernel is symmetric; retained rejection self-loops make the uniform fixed-degree distribution stationary and ensure aperiodicity.
knowledge.schedule_basis: Converted the registered 100E/20E accepted-swap schedule to fixed proposal time using the archived acceptance rate 0.15763346444237158.
